hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/project-memory.json ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] н”„лЎңм қнҠё л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ ===' && cat .claude/project-memory.json; elif [ -f claude-progress.txt ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] м„ём…ҳ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё ===' && cat claude-progress.txt; elif [ -f feature_list.json ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] кё°лҠҘ лӘ©лЎқ ===' && cat feature_list.json; fi

mkdir -p .claude && if [ ! -f .claude/.context_loaded ]; then if [ -f .claude/project-memory.json ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] н”„лЎңм қнҠё л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ ===' && cat .claude/project-memory.json; elif [ -f claude-progress.txt ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] м„ём…ҳ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё ===' && cat claude-progress.txt; elif [ -f feature_list.json ]; then echo '=== [claude-unity-harness] кё°лҠҘ лӘ©лЎқ ===' && cat feature_list.json; fi; touch .claude/.context_loaded; fi
rm -f .claude/.context_loaded && echo '[claude-unity-harness] м„ём…ҳ мў…лЈҢ. лӢӨмқҢ м„ём…ҳм—җм„ң м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠёк°Җ мһҗлҸҷ лЎңл“ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.'

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"' 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.cs$' && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ ! -f "${FILE}.meta" ]; then echo "[claude-unity-harness] вҡ пёҸ .meta нҢҢмқј м—ҶмқҢ: ${FILE}.meta вҶ’ Unity EditorлҘј м—ҙм–ҙ мһҗлҸҷ мғқм„ұн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ pre-commit hookмқҙ мІҳлҰ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ."; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"' 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.cs$'; then printf '=== [claude-unity-harness] Unity C# к·ңм№ҷ ===
- private н•„л“ң: m_ м ‘л‘җмӮ¬ (m_health)
- мғҒмҲҳ: k_ м ‘л‘җмӮ¬ (k_MaxCount)
- м •м Ғ: s_ м ‘л‘җмӮ¬ (s_instance)
- мӨ‘кҙ„нҳё: Allman мҠӨнғҖмқј (м—¬лҠ” мӨ‘кҙ„нҳё мғҲ мӨ„)
- Update()м—җм„ң GetComponent нҳём¶ң кёҲм§Җ вҶ’ Awakeм—җм„ң мәҗмӢұ
- public н•„л“ң м§Ғм ‘ л…ём¶ң кёҲм§Җ вҶ’ [SerializeField] private мӮ¬мҡ©
- OnDisable/OnDestroyм—җм„ң мқҙлІӨнҠё кө¬лҸ… н•ҙм ң н•„мҲҳ
'; fi
